description: Phishing templates impersonating Microsoft products and services

templates.name: Microsoft Account Suspicious Sign-In
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: Review recent sign-in from Bogotá, Colombia
Security alert: Unrecognized device accessed your Microsoft account
templates.notes: Use {{.Date}} for current date realism. The specific location (Bogotá) adds believability. Works across all Microsoft 365 users.
